---
title: "Contact"
subtitle: "Get in Touch & Professional References"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Sections"
---

## Let's Connect

I am open to opportunities, collaborations, and professional networking. Please connect using the details below.

---

## Contact Details

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

### Direct Contact

{{< fa envelope >}} **Email**  
[your-email@example.com](mailto:)

{{< fa brands linkedin >}} **LinkedIn**  
[Add your LinkedIn URL](https://linkedin.com){target="_blank"}

{{< fa brands github >}} **GitHub**  
[Add your GitHub URL](https://github.com){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

### Location & Availability

{{< fa location-dot >}} **Based in:** [City, Country]  
{{< fa clock >}} **Time Zone:** [Your timezone]  
{{< fa calendar-check >}} **Availability:** [Your availability]  

:::

:::

---

## Professional References

::: {.callout-note title="Reference Availability"}
Full references are available upon request.
:::

### Reference 1 — Academic Supervisor

**[Reference Name]**  
*[Reference Title]*  
[Organization]

- {{< fa envelope >}} [reference-email@example.com]  
- {{< fa phone >}} [Phone Number]  
- *Relationship: [How this person knows your work]*  

---

### Reference 2 — Industry / Internship Supervisor

**[Reference Name]**  
*[Reference Title]*  
[Organization]

- {{< fa envelope >}} [reference-email@example.com]  
- {{< fa brands linkedin >}} [LinkedIn Profile](https://linkedin.com){target="_blank"}  
- *Relationship: [How this person knows your work]*  

---

## Response Time

I aim to respond within **[X business days]**.

::: {.callout-tip title="Best Way to Reach Me"}
[State your preferred contact channel.]
:::

---

## Open to Opportunities

I am currently open to:

- [ ] [Opportunity type]
- [ ] [Opportunity type]
- [ ] [Opportunity type]
- [ ] [Opportunity type]

---

*Thank you for visiting my portfolio. I look forward to hearing from you!*
